code:
import io
import string

match io.read_line()
when Some(line)
  match string.parse_int(string.trim(line))
  when Some(score)
    if score >= 90
      println("A")
    else if score >= 75
      println("B")
    else if score >= 60
      println("C")
    else
      println("F")
    end
  when None
    println("F")
  end
when None
  println("F")
end
